description: The ReqView example project is open showing the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document. The project contains multiple documents including NEEDS (User Needs) and SRS. Requirement SRS-245 ('The application shall allow users to export requirements to an Enterprise Architect model.') currently has no traceability links. Create a traceability link from SRS-245 to the matching user story NEEDS-82 ('Export to Enterprise Architect') in the NEEDS document. The link direction should be: SRS-245 satisfies NEEDS-82.
